\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}

\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{I}[\Psi] = \int_{\mathcal{B}} \mathrm{d}^{3}x\, \rho_{\mathrm{info}}(\Psi(\mathbf{x},t)), \end{equation}
